case_title: ALEXIS LEE VS. CATHOLIC CHARITIES CYO COMMUNITY HOUSING et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-03-2010 HELD. SELF-REPRESENTED PLAINTIFF ALEXIS LEE AND COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANTS PRESENT. THE COURT CONTINUED THE CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE TO DEC-01-2010 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 TO SET TRIAL. PLAINTIFFS ARE TO HAVE THEIR ATTORNEY PRESENT AT THE HEARING. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-01-2010 HELD. ALEXIS LEE, PLAINTIFF, APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT IN THIS MATTER. JUDITH ANDERSON APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP. SEAN MORIARTY APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT CATHOLIC CHARITIES CYO. THE COURT SETS A TRIAL DATE OF 3/28/2011 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. JURY TRIAL DEMANDED BY DEFENDANT. A NEW MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND NOTICE WILL BE MAILED BY THE COURT. JUDITH ANDERSON FOR DEFENDANT IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER AND GIVE NOTICE. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
